response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: all x.(TypeOfLeukemia(x) -> Disease(x))
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x.(TypeOfLeukemia(x) -> (Disease(x) & BloodCancer(x)))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: all x.(TypeOfLeukemia(x) -> (Disease(x) & BloodCancer(x) & TypeOfLeukemia(x)))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: all x.(Disease(x) -> BloodCancer(x))
